mapper.update: UPDATE PRV_BATCH_EXECUTION SET STATUS_CODE = #{statusCode}, TARGET_COUNT = #{targetCount}, PROCESSED_COUNT = #{processedCount}, ERROR_COUNT = #{errorCount}, FINISHED_AT = #{finishedAt}, ERROR_MESSAGE = #{errorMessage} WHERE BATCH_EXECUTION_ID = #{batchExecutionId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM PRV_BATCH_EXECUTION WHERE #{baseDate} IS NULL OR BASE_DATE = #{baseDate} ORDER BY BATCH_EXECUTION_ID DESC
SELECT s.* FROM PRV_BATCH_STEP_EXECUTION s JOIN PRV_BATCH_EXECUTION b ON b.BATCH_EXECUTION_ID = s.BATCH_EXECUTION_ID WHERE b.BATCH_RUN_NO = #{batchRunNo} ORDER BY s.STEP_EXECUTION_ID ASC
